calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Amrutha Venugopal for Debra Scripps-McGrath, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Roye Randall for Sacramento County Child Support Services Department (via Zoom).
Steven Schroeder for Inheritance Funding Company, Inc., Assignee (via Zoom).

The Court acknowledged Mr. Randall's declaration concerning the $9,900 payment to Inheritance Funding Company. Ms. Randall confirmed that her client agrees that Inheritance Funding Company should be paid first and clarified that the county's lien will be reduced to $36,635.90 after the payment to Inheritance Funding Company. Ms. Venugopal inquired whether Child Support Services would make any claim against the remaining estate reserve. Ms. Randall confirmed that for the purpose of resolving the matter today, they will not claim any portion of the reserve and will accept the lien reduction as final.

The court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
